rag_rules: Fix unresolved references in AGREE contracts by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope or properly declared as helpers.
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers in AGREE annexes that are not present in the AADL model or its dependencies.
generic_rules: When AGREE diagnostics report unresolved references, trace the issue to the first invalid identifier and correct the root cause.
Ensure AGREE expressions have valid types by matching helper declarations with their referenced values.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid AADL scopes: component types for assumptions/guarantees, implementations for bindings.
AGREE scalar types are int, real, and bool; avoid using AADL type names directly in AGREE declarations.
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to resolve AGREE reference errors; instead, fix or remove invalid clauses.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers in AGREE annexes unless they are explicitly declared in the AADL model.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about property associations
AGREE validator diagnostics about component type contracts
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
